name: construction contractors managing 5-15 job sites tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 job sites, inefficient progress reporting causes project delays. We automate photo conversion into reports instead of manual photo organization and reporting.
problem_solved: Inefficient progress reporting from job site photos

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient progress reporting from job site photos
